content.text:
The track ahead shows a long straight with the car perfectly centered on the dashed yellow line, with a gentle right curve beginning in the far distance.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 15, target index = (15+5) % 121 = 20
- Target WP20: x=6.0553, y=0.6823
- Car: x=5.2058, y=0.6812, heading=-0.796°
- dy = 0.6823 - 0.6812 = 0.0011, dx = 6.0553 - 5.2058 = 0.8495
- bearing = atan2(0.0011, 0.8495) = 0.074°
- delta = 0.074 - (-0.796) = +0.870° → |delta| < 5°, go straight

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.00280m
- edge_distance ≈ 0.378m → well clear on both sides

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is nearly perfectly centered on a long straight with delta ~0.87°, well within the go-straight threshold; maintain full speed with no steering correction.",

    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3-6.5.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2, y increases from 0.7 to 1.4).",
    "After the right curve, track goes left and loops back along y≈2.77.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Car heading is ~-0.8° (nearly due east), nearly perfectly centered.",
    "Right curve starts significantly around WP24-30; prepare to steer right when approaching x~6.4.",
    "No objects on track detected.",
    "Boundary safety check: edge_distance ~0.378m, well clear on both sides."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.9908, 5.1037, 5.2058],
    "y": [0.6844, 0.6830, 0.6812],
    "heading": [-0.533, -0.642, -0.796]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP20 at (6.055, 0.682): bearing=0.074°, delta=+0.87° → essentially straight, no correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
